shell.invalidUnlockToken: Enter a valid admin token to unlock the console.
shell.loadRuntimeFailed: Could not load runtime data. Refresh or check that the runtime is running.
shell.logoutFailed: Could not log out. Try again.

providers.title: Providers
providers.subtitle: Connect providers and review provider capabilities.

actions.title: Actions
actions.subtitle: Search, inspect, and debug local runtime actions.

access.title: API Key
access.subtitle: Manage runtime API tokens for agents and clients.

resources.title: Resources
resources.subtitle: Generated API references and tool metadata.

overview.noCallTrendDescription: Run an action to see daily service call volume.
overview.noRecentCallsDescription: Run an action to see provider call counts.

providers.noProvidersDescription: Try a different search or status filter.
providers.providerNotFoundDescription: {{service}} does not match the current catalog.
providers.selectProviderDescription: Choose a provider to inspect connection settings.
providers.runtimeUnavailableDescription: {{name}} remains visible for catalog reference, but connections and actions are unavailable in the current runtime.

connectionDescriptions.noSetup: This provider can run without local credentials.
connectionDescriptions.oauthClientRequired: {{name}} needs a local OAuth client before OAuth can start.
connectionDescriptions.notConnected: Configure local credentials before running credentialed {{name}} actions.
connectionDescriptions.unavailable: Connections cannot be configured in the current runtime.

providers.noConnectionMethodDescription: This provider does not need local credentials.
providers.scopesDescription: Scopes requested by this provider's local actions.
providers.actionsDescription: {{count}} local runtime actions in the catalog.

connectionMessages.noAuth: This provider runs without local credentials.
connectionMessages.needsOAuthClient: {{name}} needs a local OAuth client before it can connect.
connectionMessages.connectOAuth: Connect {{name}} through its OAuth authorization flow.
connectionMessages.configureOAuthFirst: Configure the OAuth client before connecting.

oauthClientSettings.missingDescription: {{name}} needs a local OAuth client before connection.
oauthClientSettings.storedSecretHint: Stored secret is not shown. Enter it again when saving changes.

actions.searchPlaceholder: Search actions by name, id, or provider
actions.noActionsDescription: Try a different search or provider filter.
actions.actionNotFoundDescription: The action route does not match the current catalog.
actions.selectActionDescription: Select an action to inspect and run it.

runs.noRunsDescription: Run an action to see recent execution history.

access.title: Runtime Tokens
access.description: Issue bearer tokens for /v1 and MCP clients. New tokens are shown once.

policy.title: Runtime Policy
policy.description: Control which actions and provider proxies this runtime may execute.
policy.rulesHint: Block rules take priority. Non-empty allowlists intersect across deployment, runtime, and token layers. Enter one rule per line.

baseline.title: Current runtime baseline
baseline.proxiesBlocked: All current providers are blocked by proxy policy
baseline.allBlocked: All catalog actions and current providers are blocked
baseline.catalogHint: Evaluated against the current action catalog

tester.title: Permission tester
tester.description: Check an action or provider against the same layered policy used at execution time.

policy.tokenSummary: Allow rules {{allowed}} · Block rules {{blocked}} · Further limited by the runtime baseline

editor.title: Edit runtime policy
editor.description: Changes are previewed against deployment constraints before you save.
editor.actionUnrestrictedHint: Keep the action scope inherited from deployment constraints.
editor.proxyUnrestrictedHint: Keep the provider scope inherited from deployment constraints.
editor.actionRestrictedHint: Require every action to match at least one runtime allow rule.
editor.proxyRestrictedHint: Require every provider proxy to match at least one runtime allow rule.
editor.actionAllowedHint: Use an exact action id, provider.*, or *.
editor.actionBlockedHint: Block wins even when the same action is allowed elsewhere.
editor.proxyBlockedHint: Blocked providers cannot receive proxy requests.
editor.actionAllowedInput: Search or enter an allowed action rule
editor.actionBlockedInput: Search or enter a blocked action rule
editor.proxyAllowedInput: Search or enter an allowed provider
editor.proxyBlockedInput: Search or enter a blocked provider
editor.advancedHint: Enter one raw rule per line. Empty allow rules mean this layer adds no restriction.
editor.ruleRequired: Enter a rule before adding it.
editor.ruleTooLong: Rules must not exceed 256 UTF-8 bytes.
editor.ruleInvalid: Use *, provider.*, an exact provider.action id, or an exact provider id for proxy rules.
editor.ruleDuplicate: This rule is already in the list.
editor.tooManyRules: A rule list cannot contain more than 128 rules.
editor.unknownRule: Not found in the current catalog
editor.actionAllowRequired: Add at least one action allow rule, or choose no additional restriction.
editor.proxyAllowRequired: Add at least one provider allow rule, or choose no additional restriction.
editor.tokenHint: Token rules can only further restrict actions allowed by deployment and runtime policy. They do not affect provider proxy requests.

impact.title: Draft impact
impact.description: This preview uses the unsaved runtime rules.
impact.actionsBlocked: This draft blocks every action in the current catalog.
impact.proxiesBlocked: This draft blocks every current provider from proxy requests.
impact.allBlocked: This draft blocks every catalog action and every current provider proxy.

confirm.title: Save a policy that blocks all capabilities?
confirm.actions: This policy blocks every action in the current catalog. Runtime clients will not be able to execute actions until the policy changes.
confirm.proxies: This policy blocks every current provider from proxy requests until the policy changes.
confirm.all: This policy blocks every catalog action and every current provider proxy until the policy changes.

access.name: Name
access.createTokenDescription: Name the client that will use this runtime token.
access.tokenShownOnce: This token is shown once. Copy it before closing this dialog.
access.noTokensDescription: Create one before connecting an MCP client or local script. The token is shown once.

apiReference.title: API Reference
apiReference.description: Browse the local runtime routes in Scalar.

mcp.title: MCP connection
mcp.description: Connect Claude Desktop or Cursor to this local runtime.

openapi.title: OpenAPI JSON
openapi.description: Use the generated spec from scripts or tool importers.
